lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows significant wear and staining. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are functional, though some components show signs of age.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require substantial mechanical and cosmetic work to return to a reliable state. The exterior shows significant signs of age and neglect, including widespread rust on the lower body panels, several deep scratches, and a large dent on the rear passenger door. Under the hood, the engine runs but suffers from a noticeable oil leak and a rough idle, while the suspension needs immediate attention. The interior is heavily worn, with torn fabric on the driver's seat and a dashboard that has cracked from sun exposure. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited as a project car or for its salvageable parts.

Discover your next favorite ride! This vehicle is in good condition, having been well-maintained and kept clean throughout its life. It performs beautifully on the road and presents very well, with only some minor, expected signs of wear from careful use. It’s a dependable, stylish option that’s ready to provide many more miles of enjoyment. This is a great opportunity to get a high-quality car that truly delivers on performance and comfort!

This vehicle is in mint, showroom condition and has been meticulously cared for throughout its life. The exterior is flawless, with the original factory paint showing a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no chips, scratches, or dings. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic feature and accessory works perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, having been stored in a climate-controlled garage and serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule. A comprehensive service history is included. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that presents and drives exactly like new.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows significant wear and staining on the upholstery. Mechanical systems are currently operational, though the vehicle will require routine maintenance in the near future.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers reliable performance paired with sophisticated styling. Each component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and longevity. An exceptional acquisition for those seeking a balance of prestige and proven dependability.

Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the ideal balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior finish remains vibrant, showing only minor, expected signs of use that are consistent with a well-cared-for car of its age. Inside, the interior is exceptionally clean and odor-free, with the upholstery and dashboard surfaces showing minimal wear. Mechanically, the car is in solid working order; it has recently passed a comprehensive safety inspection and features a documented history of regular oil changes and preventative maintenance. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts crisply, and all onboard electronics—from the premium audio system to the dual-zone climate control—are fully operational. With plenty of life left in the tires and brakes, this vehicle represents a reliable and stylish choice for its next owner. Detailed service logs are available for review to ensure total transparency.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which demonstrates robust mechanical integrity and consistent performance standards. This model has been curated to ensure a sophisticated driving experience, balancing engineering excellence with aesthetic preservation. Reflecting a history of responsible ownership, the vehicle offers a reliable and refined solution for those seeking a premium automotive investment. This offering represents a significant opportunity to acquire a well-preserved example of its class at a highly competitive valuation.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic presence, this unit serves as an ideal selection for the discerning driver prioritizing quality and enduring value. Available for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-loved over the years. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this beauty is ready to hit the road with you today. It's super reliable and looks great too—I'm sure you're going to love it! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six engine with its signature individual throttle bodies and 8,000 RPM redline. The powertrain remains robust, benefiting from a recent VANOS overhaul and valve clearance adjustment to ensure optimal timing and compression. The chassis has been enhanced with subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings, maintaining the precise handling characteristics of the M-tuned suspension. Mated to a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential, this vehicle offers an analog driving experience that is increasingly rare. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the mechanical vitals are strong, making it an ideal candidate for the spirited enthusiast.
Used vehicle in good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean interior. Minor exterior scuffs. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a well-maintained example that balances daily utility with a premium feel. The exterior paint retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, inevitable stone chips from highway use, while the body panels remain straight and free of significant blemishes. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and has been kept in a smoke-free environment. The leather seating surfaces are supple with only light creasing on the driver’s bolster, and every interior component—from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system—operates perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; the engine pulls strongly and smoothly, and the transmission provides crisp, confident shifts. It has benefited from a consistent maintenance schedule, including a recent oil service and a multi-point inspection confirming that the brakes and tires have plenty of life remaining. This is a turn-key vehicle, ready to provide its next owner with a reliable and sophisticated driving experience.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating robust mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience and aesthetic appeal that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Fully inspected to ensure continued reliability and performance, this model stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership.

This meticulously maintained vehicle exemplifies balanced performance and enduring value. Presented in commendable condition, it features a well-preserved interior and a robust mechanical profile. It stands as a testament to responsible ownership, offering a sophisticated driving experience for those who prioritize both reliability and prestige. We invite you to inspect this exceptional offering at your earliest convenience.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride that’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left in it for your daily commutes or fun weekend getaways. It runs smoothly and has been well-cared for, so you can just hop in and hit the road! I’m looking for a great new owner who will appreciate it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from documented subframe reinforcement and refreshed suspension bushings. Power is delivered via a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive rod bearing service and valve adjustment, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain operates within factory tolerances. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its age, the mechanical integrity is robust, offering a communicative driving experience with sharp turn-in and balanced weight distribution. A driver-focused example primed for the enthusiast.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily practicality. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like luster, showing only the minor stone chips and light road-wear expected of a car that has been enjoyed responsibly. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is supple and free of tears, and all dashboard electronics, including the infotainment and climate control systems, function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having undergone regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance with a comprehensive service log included for your peace of mind. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the tires have plenty of life remaining. It drives tight and true, offering a refined experience for its next owner. This is a solid, honest example of a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for the road immediately.

It runs great, looks sharp, and has been super dependable for me. If you're looking for a reliable set of wheels that’s been well-cared for and is ready for many more miles, this is the one for you. The exterior features a deep Mineral White Metallic finish that retains a brilliant shine, though it shows minor, expected road wear on the lower front valence. Inside, the Mocha Dakota leather upholstery is supple and free of tears, complemented by genuine Fineline Ridge wood trim that remains vibrant and unscratched. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium Harman Kardon surround sound system, functions exactly as intended.
